description: Bundle that installs the four landing-page use cases in dependency order: landing-page-summary (upstream evidence), brand-kit, optimize-landing-page, and landing-page-experiments. After all four install, a bundle-level intro ties them together.

requires.runtime: any Runneth sandbox; Playwright auto-installed by landing-page-summary on first use

post-install.name: Install landing-page-summary
post-install.description: Upstream evidence layer; runs first because every other landing-page skill calls it fresh.

post-install.name: Install brand-kit
post-install.description: Brand extraction. Reads landing-page-summary output as input.

post-install.name: Install optimize-landing-page
post-install.description: CRO audit. Reads landing-page-summary output and brand-kit if present.

post-install.name: Install landing-page-experiments
post-install.description: Scored A/B test backlog. Reads all three upstream outputs.

post-install.name: Introduce the new capability
post-install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.

changelog.notes: Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.
Initial install-config for the bundle parent. Installs the four landing-page sub-use-cases in dependency order.
